metadata.description: JM Agentic Development Kit — 3 plugins for the full software lifecycle. Sovereign Architect (architecture + code), Plugin QA (plugin development), AAD (specification-driven governance). IIKit-governed. MIT license.

plugins.name: sovereign-architect
plugins.description: Sovereign Architect v4.0 — Evidence-based technical leadership. 66 agents, 128 skills, 120 commands. 5 movements (CREATE/REVIEW/EVOLVE/REPAIR/DIAGNOSE). Zero-assumption protocol.

plugins.name: plugin-qa
plugins.description: Plugin QA v3.0 — Full plugin development lifecycle for Claude Code plugins. 4 agents, 20 skills, 31 commands, 9 movements (IDEATE through FIX). Auto-fix, scorecards, conformance.

plugins.name: aad-metodologia
plugins.description: AAD v1.0 — Assisted Agentic Development by MetodologIA. Specification-driven AI development with cryptographic BDD verification, Neo-Swiss dashboard, Intent Integrity Kit governance.
